chunks.text: On a rainy Saturday, a thick envelope arrived in our mailbox.
On the front, my name and address were written neatly.
I found a letter from my cousin who lives far away.
I was surprised and happy to receive it.
My cousin wrote about many fun things that happened at school
At the end, she wrote, “ I am waiting for your reply.
At my desk, I started to write a reply at once.
Writing letters is a slow way to communicate, different from email or phone.
When I finished, I put a colorful stamp on the envelope.
A letter is a quiet gift that carries feelings across time.
